title: cercocoma wallichii
intro: Cercocoma wallichii, also known as Devil's Claw or Harpagophytum, is a flowering plant native to the deserts and semi-deserts of southern Africa. The plant's medicinal properties are primarily due to its iridoid glycosides, particularly harpagoside, which have anti-inflammatory and pain-relieving effects. The health benefits of Cercocoma wallichii include reducing joint pain and inflammation, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of anxiety and depression. The plant is often prepared as a herbal tea or capsule, with some traditional remedies also involving the root being dried and powdered or made into a tincture.
